divergent_child.mechanism: different driver: post-stress credit/equity/defensive ETF dispersion reversal rather than trend-following risk-off rotation
divergent_child.title: Divergent from AR-025: cross-asset credit/equity stress dispersion mean reversion

command: set -a; source /Users/moonk/.hermes/profiles/alphaaoi/secrets/alpaca.env; set +a; export ALPACA_API_KEY="${ALPACA_API_KEY:-${ALPACA_KEY_ID:-}}"; export ALPACA_PAPER=true; /Users/moonk/quant-for-agent/.venv/bin/qfa backtest run /Users/moonk/quant-for-agent/models/risk-off-crossasset-randomcost-v1/model.py --symbols SPY,QQQ,IWM,TLT,GLD,XLU,XLE --start 2021-01-04 --end 2025-12-15 --timeframe 1Day --initial-cash 100000 --db <temporary-sqlite-db>

costs_slippage.handling: qfa CLI has no cost/slippage parameter; primary qfa metrics are pre-cost. Ex-post turnover haircut assumes 5 bps one-way cost/slippage on daily one-way turnover.

data_source: Alpaca real market data via qfa AlpacaGateway; no CSV; --data-csv was not used

db.note: Each qfa run used a temporary SQLite DB that was deleted after JSON capture.

decision_rationale: Rejected: primary qfa Sharpe, approximate cost-haircut Sharpe, and median random-window qfa Sharpe are non-positive; no direct refinement/inversion/extension created.

orthogonality.method: Pearson correlation of daily qfa equity returns from retained latest.json curves

parameter_stability.interpretation: random windows are the stability check; no alternate parameters selected after seeing results
parameter_stability.tested: fixed refined parameters from AR-008-R1 candidate; no grid search per AR-025 efficiency constraint
